reviews.comment:
Hay que hacer cola en una sola fila fuera de la estación (en la calle) y te enterás cuando entrás a la estación. Atienden muy lento y tienen problemas para usar la aplicación y hacer una fact. A

(Translated by Google)
You have to queue in a single line outside the station (on the street) and you only find out when you go inside. Service is very slow and they have problems using the app to generate a receipt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMDVQUUt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Playeros bien.
El Store medio pelo, café frío, tuve que pedir dos veces que me lo cambien. WiFi se caía a cada rato.
Baños sucios.

(Translated by Google)
Beach shoes were good.
The store was mediocre, the coffee was cold, I had to ask them to replace it twice. The Wi-Fi kept dropping.
The bathrooms were dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMGUzZlpBEAE
